name: Crews Bank & Trust
description_short: Crews Bank & Trust is a full-service bank with 90+ years of Florida history, offering personal and business banking, mortgages, investment services, and trust administration through multiple branches including Sarasota.
description_long:
Crews Bank & Trust is a Florida-based bank with over 90 years of history serving residents and businesses across the state. The company operates multiple branch locations, including a recently renovated 2,500-square-foot Sarasota branch opened in December 2019, positioned in the heart of Sarasota's business district. Their longevity and regional focus reflect a commitment to relationship-based banking in Florida communities.

The bank offers comprehensive personal banking services including checking, savings, money markets, health savings accounts, time deposits, and credit cards with extended FDIC coverage. On the lending side, they provide mortgages, consumer loans, home equity lines of credit, and digital investing through Crews Invest. For business customers, Crews Bank & Trust delivers commercial real estate loans, term loans, SBA loans, business lines of credit, treasury management services, merchant services, payroll services, and specialized products for money service businesses. They also provide trust and wealth management services, including IRAs, trust administration, estate planning, and document reviews.

The Sarasota branch distinguishes itself through a modern, open-concept design that blends technology with traditional relationship-based service. The physical space includes amenities like a curved teller pod, four dedicated offices, a conference room, safe-deposit-box viewing room, and a hospitality bar offering coffee, refreshments, and pet amenities. The bank emphasizes that customers don't have to choose between service and technology, and they actively warn customers about scams targeting their name, providing a dedicated fraud hotline (888-406-2220). Their website includes educational resources like how-to videos, a blog, kids' and teens' financial education sections, and tools like Quicken and QuickBooks integration.

Crws Bank & Trust is best suited for Florida residents and businesses seeking traditional, relationship-focused banking with digital capabilities and trust/wealth management services. Their 90-year history and established presence suggest stability, though as a regional bank they may have fewer nationwide conveniences than larger national institutions. The emphasis on personal service and community presence appeals to customers who value local banking relationships alongside modern online and mobile banking functionality.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 90+ years of banking history and experience serving Florida residents and businesses
Modern Sarasota branch (opened Dec 2019) with renovated 2,500 sq ft space blending technology and traditional service
Comprehensive service offerings: personal banking, business banking, mortgages, trust/wealth management, and investment services
Full FDIC coverage options including extended FDIC coverage for deposits
Specialized services for business customers including SBA loans, commercial real estate loans, and treasury management
Physical amenities at Sarasota branch including safe-deposit boxes, conference room, and hospitality bar
Digital capabilities including online banking, mobile banking, bill pay, Zelle, and integration with Quicken/QuickBooks
cons: Regional bank limited primarily to Florida locations, which may lack nationwide branch/ATM convenience for customers who relocate
Website content does not disclose specific APR ranges, fee structures, or competitive rates for products like checking, savings, or loans
No information provided about account minimums, promotional rates, or current product terms that would help consumers compare offerings
Subject to scam impersonation targeting, requiring customers to verify legitimacy by calling directly rather than trusting contact initiation
Limited transparency on website regarding financial strength metrics, FDIC insurance limits on specific account types, or trust service pricing
best_for: Florida-based business owners seeking relationship-driven banking with SBA loans, commercial real estate financing, and treasury management
Sarasota-area residents and professionals wanting a full-service bank with trust/wealth management and estate planning services
Customers who value local branch relationships, community banking, and in-person service alongside digital banking capabilities
High-net-worth individuals seeking trust administration, investment management, and estate services in Florida
diagnosis: Crews Bank & Trust is best for Florida residents and businesses seeking a traditional, relationship-focused full-service bank with comprehensive offerings in personal banking, lending, and wealth management. The main caveat is that as a regional Florida bank, they offer limited geographic convenience outside the state, and the website lacks transparency on rates, fees, and account terms needed for detailed product comparison.
services: Money market accounts and certificates of deposit (time deposits)
Consumer loans and home equity lines of credit
Commercial real estate loans, term loans, and SBA loans
Business checking, savings, and merchant services
Treasury management services and ACH origination
Payroll services and remote deposit capture
Trust administration and estate planning services
Wealth management and investment advisory services through Crews Invest
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
